entries.name: Completions
entries.code:
Completions = object
  len*: csize_t
  cvec*: cstringArray

entries.name: CompletionCallback
entries.code: CompletionCallback = proc (a2: cstring; a3: ptr Completions) {.cdecl.}

entries.name: setCompletionCallback
entries.code:
proc setCompletionCallback(a2: CompletionCallback) {.
    importc: "linenoiseSetCompletionCallback", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: addCompletion
entries.code:
proc addCompletion(a2: ptr Completions; a3: cstring) {.
    importc: "linenoiseAddCompletion", raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: readLine
entries.code:
proc readLine(prompt: cstring): cstring {.importc: "linenoise", raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: historyAdd
historySetMaxLen
entries.code:
proc historySetMaxLen(len: cint): cint {.importc: "linenoiseHistorySetMaxLen",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: historySave
entries.code:
proc historySave(filename: cstring): cint {.importc: "linenoiseHistorySave",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: historyLoad
entries.code:
proc historyLoad(filename: cstring): cint {.importc: "linenoiseHistoryLoad",
    raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: setMultiLine
entries.code:
proc setMultiLine(ml: cint) {.importc: "linenoiseSetMultiLine", raises: [],
                              tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: free
entries.code:
proc free(s: cstring) {.importc: "free", header: "<stdlib.h>", raises: [],
                        tags: [], forbids: [].}

entries.name: ReadLineResult
entries.code:
ReadLineResult = object
  line*: string
  status*: Status

entries.name: readLineStatus
entries.code:
proc readLineStatus(prompt: string; result: var ReadLineResult) {.raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
entries.description: line editing API that allows returning the line entered and an indicator of which control key was entered, allowing user to distinguish between for example ctrl-C vs ctrl-D.
